name: Microsoft Defender for Endpoint
description: Integrates with Microsoft Defender for Endpoint APIs for advanced endpoint detection, investigation, and automated response across Windows, macOS, and Linux devices

actions.name: List Alerts
actions.description: Retrieve a collection of recent alerts from Microsoft Defender for Endpoint

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of alerts to return

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: OData filter expression (e.g., severity eq 'High')

parameters.name: $orderby
parameters.description: OData orderby expression (e.g., alertCreationTime desc)

actions.name: Get Alert
actions.description: Retrieve a specific alert by its ID

parameters.name: alert_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the alert

actions.name: List Machines
actions.description: Retrieve a collection of machines that have communicated with Microsoft Defender for Endpoint

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of machines to return

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: OData filter expression (e.g., healthStatus eq 'Active')

actions.name: Get Machine
actions.description: Retrieve details of a specific machine by its ID

parameters.name: machine_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the machine

actions.name: Find Machines by IP
actions.description: Find machines that were seen with a specific internal IP address at a given timestamp

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: The IP address to search for

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: Timestamp in ISO 8601 format for the lookup time

actions.name: Isolate Machine
actions.description: Isolate a machine from accessing external network while retaining connectivity to Defender for Endpoint service

parameters.name: machine_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the machine to isolate

parameters.name: Comment
parameters.description: Comment to associate with the isolation action

parameters.name: IsolationType
parameters.description: Type of isolation: Full (complete isolation) or Selective (restrict limited set of apps)

actions.name: Release Machine from Isolation
actions.description: Undo isolation of a machine and restore full network access

parameters.name: machine_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the machine to release

parameters.name: Comment
parameters.description: Comment to associate with the action

actions.name: Stop and Quarantine File
actions.description: Stop execution of a file on a machine and quarantine it

parameters.name: machine_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the machine

parameters.name: Comment
parameters.description: Comment to associate with the action

parameters.name: Sha1
parameters.description: SHA1 hash of the file to quarantine

actions.name: Run Antivirus Scan
actions.description: Initiate a Microsoft Defender Antivirus scan on the machine

parameters.name: machine_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the machine to scan

parameters.name: Comment
parameters.description: Comment to associate with the action

parameters.name: ScanType
parameters.description: Type of scan: Quick or Full

actions.name: Collect Investigation Package
actions.description: Collect a forensic investigation package from a machine

parameters.name: machine_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the machine

parameters.name: Comment
parameters.description: Comment to associate with the action

actions.name: Get File Information
actions.description: Retrieve file information by SHA1 hash or SHA256 hash

parameters.name: file_hash
parameters.description: SHA1 or SHA256 hash of the file

actions.name: Create Indicator
actions.description: Submit or update a new indicator (IoC) for detection and blocking

parameters.name: indicatorValue
parameters.description: The indicator value (IP, URL, domain, or file hash)

parameters.name: indicatorType
parameters.description: Type of indicator: FileSha1, FileSha256, IpAddress, DomainName, or Url

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Action to take: Alert, AlertAndBlock, or Allowed

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Title for the indicator alert

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Severity of the indicator: Informational, Low, Medium, or High

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Description of the indicator

actions.name: Advanced Hunting
actions.description: Run an advanced hunting query using Kusto Query Language (KQL)

parameters.name: Query
parameters.description: The KQL hunting query to execute

actions.name: Get Machine Actions
actions.description: Retrieve the collection of machine actions (response actions history)

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: OData filter expression

actions.name: Run Live Response
actions.description: Run a live response command on a specific device

parameters.name: machine_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the target machine

parameters.name: Commands
parameters.description: JSON array of commands to run in the live response session

parameters.name: Comment
parameters.description: Comment to associate with the live response action
